fpm_bc_compat.config.title: First Person Model x Better Combat Fix
fpm_bc_compat.config.body_y_offset.toolt: Adjusts the vertical body position when crouching to align with FPM.
fpm_bc_compat.config.transition_speed.to: How fast the arm smooths between upper and lower look states. Smaller is slower.
fpm_bc_compat.config.pitch_multiplier.to: Factor applied to camera angle. Higher values make the arm follow the look angle more aggressively.
fpm_bc_compat.config.upper_bias.tooltip: Additional rotation applied ONLY when looking at the sky. Smooths automatically.
fpm_bc_compat.config.lower_bias.tooltip: Additional rotation applied ONLY when looking at the ground. Smooths automatically.
fpm_bc_compat.config.curve_correction.to: Prevents the arm from 'running away' from the crosshair at steep angles. Higher values slow down rotation at poles.
fpm_bc_compat.config.curve_floor.tooltip: Ensures the weapon remains visible even at 90 degrees. 0.15 = 15% minimum rotation strength.
fpm_bc_compat.config.lookup_z_shift.tool: Automatically pushes the arm forward when looking up to prevent camera clipping. Default 3.1 ensures full visibility at -90 degrees.
